---
title: "Course Chapters"
subtitle: "Generated chapter and section index"
---

# Chapter Map

Use `chapters/` as the canonical content source. Each section owns three
outputs:

```text
chapters/
  chapter-NN/
    index.qmd
    sections/
      NN-section-slug/
        video-lesson-slides.qmd
        web-notes.qmd
        pdf-notes.qmd
```

The directory tree is the router. Run `scripts/shell/sync-section-structure.sh` after
adding, renaming, or removing section folders.
Run `scripts/shell/sync-output-formats.sh` after editing section front matter so
generated output settings stay aligned with each file type.

# Chapters

## Chapter 01. Backtesting and Automated Execution

- [1.1 The Importance of Backtesting](chapter-01/sections/01-the-importance-of-backtesting/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-01/sections/01-the-importance-of-backtesting/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-01/sections/01-the-importance-of-backtesting/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [1.2 Common Pitfalls of Backtesting](chapter-01/sections/02-common-pitfalls-of-backtesting/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-01/sections/02-common-pitfalls-of-backtesting/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-01/sections/02-common-pitfalls-of-backtesting/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [1.3 Statistical Significance of Backtesting](chapter-01/sections/03-statistical-significance-of-backtesting/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-01/sections/03-statistical-significance-of-backtesting/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-01/sections/03-statistical-significance-of-backtesting/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [1.4 When Not to Backtest a Strategy](chapter-01/sections/04-when-not-to-backtest-a-strategy/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-01/sections/04-when-not-to-backtest-a-strategy/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-01/sections/04-when-not-to-backtest-a-strategy/pdf-notes.qmd)

## Chapter 02. The Basics of Mean Reversion

- [2.1 Mean Reversion and Stationarity](chapter-02/sections/01-mean-reversion-and-stationarity/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-02/sections/01-mean-reversion-and-stationarity/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-02/sections/01-mean-reversion-and-stationarity/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [2.2 Cointegration](chapter-02/sections/02-cointegration/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-02/sections/02-cointegration/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-02/sections/02-cointegration/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [2.3 Pros and Cons of Mean-Reverting Strategies](chapter-02/sections/03-pros-and-cons-of-mean-reverting-strategies/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-02/sections/03-pros-and-cons-of-mean-reverting-strategies/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-02/sections/03-pros-and-cons-of-mean-reverting-strategies/pdf-notes.qmd)

## Chapter 03. Implementing Mean Reversion Strategies

- [3.1 Trading Pairs Using Price Spreads, Log Price Spreads, or Ratios](chapter-03/sections/01-trading-pairs-using-price-spreads-log-price-spreads-or-ratios/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-03/sections/01-trading-pairs-using-price-spreads-log-price-spreads-or-ratios/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-03/sections/01-trading-pairs-using-price-spreads-log-price-spreads-or-ratios/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [3.2 Bollinger Bands](chapter-03/sections/02-bollinger-bands/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-03/sections/02-bollinger-bands/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-03/sections/02-bollinger-bands/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [3.3 Does Scaling-in Work?](chapter-03/sections/03-does-scaling-in-work/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-03/sections/03-does-scaling-in-work/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-03/sections/03-does-scaling-in-work/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [3.4 Kalman Filter as Dynamic Linear Regression](chapter-03/sections/04-kalman-filter-as-dynamic-linear-regression/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-03/sections/04-kalman-filter-as-dynamic-linear-regression/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-03/sections/04-kalman-filter-as-dynamic-linear-regression/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [3.5 Kalman Filter as Market-Making Model](chapter-03/sections/05-kalman-filter-as-market-making-model/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-03/sections/05-kalman-filter-as-market-making-model/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-03/sections/05-kalman-filter-as-market-making-model/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [3.6 The Danger of Data Errors](chapter-03/sections/06-the-danger-of-data-errors/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats: [video](chapter-03/sections/06-the-danger-of-data-errors/video-lesson-slides.qmd), [PDF](chapter-03/sections/06-the-danger-of-data-errors/pdf-notes.qmd)

# Authoring Convention

- Create one folder per chapter: `chapters/chapter-02/`.
- Put the chapter landing page at `chapters/chapter-02/index.qmd`.
- Put each section under `chapters/chapter-02/sections/NN-section-slug/`.
- Include `video-lesson-slides.qmd`, `web-notes.qmd`, and `pdf-notes.qmd` in
  every section folder.
- Keep section front matter focused on descriptive metadata such as `title` and
  `subtitle`; run `scripts/shell/sync-output-formats.sh` to add generated formats.
- Run `scripts/shell/sync-section-structure.sh`; do not hand-edit generated routing.
